texto: If Roberts had been a poet or a painter or a musician
autor: we might have had a masterpiece. As he was neither: we had a monster
explicacao: Citação de we might have had a masterpiece. As he was neither: we had a monster sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If Roberts had been a poet or a painter or a musician” articula reflexao, arthur-machen, roberts em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
